Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Represents a user account within the TimeSync application, including personal, employment, and permission details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Profile entity, matching Firebase Auth UID.

email.description: The email address of the user.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was last updated.

weeklyHours.description: The number of hours the user is expected to work per week.

employmentPercentage.description: The user's employment percentage (e.g., 100 for full-time).

salaryValue.description: The user's salary, either monthly or hourly depending on employment type.

endDate.description: The user's employment end date, if applicable.

noticePeriod.description: The notice period for the employment.

vacationDays.description: Total number of vacation days per year.

employeeId.description: The 5-digit employee ID, used as a username.

isClockedIn.description: Indicates if the user is currently clocked in.

shiftStartTime.description: The start time of the current active shift, if any.

activeTimeEntryId.description: The ID of the currently active time entry document.

lastActivity.description: Timestamp of the user's last activity (clock-in or clock-out) to track daily presence.

permissions.description: A map of boolean flags for user permissions.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a project against which users can log their time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

profileId.description: Reference to the Profile entity that owns this project. (Relationship: Profile 1:N Project)

description.description: A detailed description of the project.

isActive.description: Indicates if the project is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents an individual task within a project for time tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project entity to which this task belongs. (Relationship: Project 1:N Task)

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

status.description: The current status of the task (e.g., 'pending', 'in-progress', 'completed').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated.

TimeEntry.title: TimeEntry
TimeEntry.description: Represents a single logged time session for a user on a specific task.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TimeEntry entity.

profileId.description: Reference to the Profile entity that created this time entry. (Relationship: Profile 1:N TimeEntry)

projectId.description: Reference to the Project entity associated with this time entry (via the task). (Relationship: Project 1:N TimeEntry)

taskId.description: Reference to the Task entity for which time was logged. (Relationship: Task 1:N TimeEntry)

startTime.description: The start date and time of the time entry.

endTime.description: The end date and time of the time entry. Can be null if the entry is still ongoing.

durationMinutes.description: The duration of the time entry in minutes. Can be derived or explicitly stored.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments for the time entry.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the time entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the time entry was last updated.

status.description: The status of the time entry.

CompanySettings.title: CompanySettings
CompanySettings.description: Stores global settings for the company, used for contract generation.

companyName.description: The legal name of the company.

contactPerson.description: The name of the contact person or signatory.

standardTerms.description: Standard terms and conditions for employment contracts.

AdjustmentLog.title: AdjustmentLog
AdjustmentLog.description: Records when an administrator manually adjusts a time entry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

adjustingUserId.description: UID of the user who made the adjustment.

adjustingUserName.description: Name of the user who made the adjustment.

action.description: Description of the manual action, e.g., 'Manual Clock-In'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the log entry was created.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, including personal details, employment terms, and permissions. The document ID `{profileId}` corresponds to the `request.auth.uid` of the authenticated user.
Contains projects created by a specific user.
Stores tasks associated with a specific project, owned by a user.
Records individual time log entries for a user.
A singleton document to store company-wide settings for contract generation.
Log of manual time adjustments made by users with permission.
